content:
type: DONE
files: src/datasets/features/features.py
note: Got the clean resent SPEC - matches what I already implemented (_merge_features_dict_value + update() decorated with keep_features_dicts_synced). Note on point 4: I don't call self[key]=merged per-key during the merge (mutate dst[key] in place instead), but since update() itself is decorated, _column_requires_decoding is fully recomputed from self.items() after update() returns, so sync correctness is preserved. Verified with a manual repro. No further changes planned; diff is final in patch.txt.
